apihelp-sanitize-mapdata-summary: Waxay fulisaa xaqiijinta xogta ee kordhinta Kartographer
apihelp-sanitize-mapdata-param-title: Cinwaanka bogga lagu rabo in GeoJSON-kan ku yaallo. Haddii aan cinwaan la bixin, waxaa la adeegsan doonaa mid ku meel-gaar ah.
apihelp-query+mapdata-summary: Codso dhammaan xogta khariidadda Kartographer ee bogagga la siiyay
apihelp-query+mapdata-example-1: Codso dhammaan xogta khariidadda ee bogga <kbd>Metallica</kbd>
apihelp-query+mapdata-example-2: Codso xogta khariidadda ee kooxaha <kbd>group1</kbd> iyo <kbd>group2</kbd> ee bogga <kbd>Metallica</kbd>
apihelp-query+mapdata-param-continue: Isticmaal cabbirkan si aad u sii waddo soo saarista natiijooyinka
apihelp-query+mapdata-param-groups: Kooxo kala go’an oo leh calaamadda | si loo soo celiyo xogta
apihelp-query+mapdata-param-limit: Xogta inta bog ee la soo celinayo
apihelp-query+mapdata-paramvalue-parser-: Samee HTML adigoo isticmaalaya tifaftirihii hore.
